ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the content item in the content hierarchy */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the content item in the content hierarchy */,
  "numchild" INTEGER /* Number of child content items */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content item */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug of the content item */,
  "live" INTEGER /* Whether the content item is live */,
  "has_unpublished_changes" INTEGER /* Whether the content item has unpublished changes */,
  "url_path" TEXT /* URL path of the content item */,
  "seo_title" TEXT /* SEO title of the content item */,
  "show_in_menus" INTEGER /* Whether the content item is shown in menus */,
  "search_description" TEXT /* Search description of the content item */,
  "go_live_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content item goes live */,
  "expire_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content item expires */,
  "expired" INTEGER /* Whether the content item has expired */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the content */,
  "draft" INTEGER /* Whether the content is in draft mode */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the content type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image for the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being revised */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (draft, published, archived) */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number for each content item */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being translated */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code of the translation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the translation */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug of the translation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the translation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the translation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the translation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the translation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_aliases" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being aliased */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias of the content item */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code of the alias */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alias was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alias was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alias */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_aliases_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_aliases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_aliases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_type_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type being permissioned */,
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group being granted permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission being granted (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type_permissions_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type_permissions_user_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user group was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being a member of the group */,
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group being a member of */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the membership */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the membership */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the membership is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
